qa_pairs.question: Where can users find example input files and run scripts for Gaussian?
qa_pairs.answer: Example input files and run scripts (<tt>*.sh</tt>) for Gaussian can be found in <tt>/opt/software/gaussian/version/examples/</tt>.

qa_pairs.question: What are the possible 'version' values for the Gaussian example directory path?
qa_pairs.answer: The possible 'version' values for the Gaussian example directory path are <tt>g03.d10</tt>, <tt>g09.e01</tt>, or <tt>g16.b01</tt>.

qa_pairs.question: Which Gaussian version includes NBO7?
qa_pairs.answer: NBO7 is included only in the <tt>g16.c01</tt> version of Gaussian.

qa_pairs.question: Which keywords will run NBO7 in the g16.c01 version of Gaussian?
qa_pairs.answer: Both <tt>nbo6</tt> and <tt>nbo7</tt> keywords will run NBO7 in the <tt>g16.c01</tt> version of Gaussian.

qa_pairs.question: Which Gaussian versions have NBO6 available?
qa_pairs.answer: NBO6 is available in the <tt>g09.e01</tt> and <tt>g16.b01</tt> versions of Gaussian.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a webinar available for running Gaussian16 and NBO7 effectively on Nibi and Fir?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, there are webinar slides available titled "Running Gaussian16 and NBO7 effectively on Nibi and Fir" from 2026.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about Gaussian error messages and their resolution?
qa_pairs.answer: Information about Gaussian error messages and suggestions for their resolution can be found on the "Gaussian error messages" page.
